## src/App.tsx

Mise à jour pour forcer la connexion Admin au chargement pour le développement.

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  ViewState, UserProfile, UserRole, JobOffer, Transaction, 
  ServiceMode, PaymentMethod, RealEstateListing, PropertyType,
  InternshipRequest, DeliveryOrder, Advertisement
} from './types';
import { 
  MOCK_PROVIDERS, MOCK_JOBS, MOCK_ADS, MOCK_DELIVERY_ORDERS, 
  MOCK_INTERNSHIP_REQUESTS, UNLOCK_CONTACT_FEE 
} from './constants';

// Components
import { Header, Footer, SecurityBanner } from './components/Layout';
import Hero from './components/Hero';
import Filters from './components/Filters';
import { ProviderCard, JobCard } from './components/ListingCards';
import { RegistrationForm } from './components/RegistrationForm';
import { PaymentModal } from './components/PaymentModal';
import { ReviewModal } from './components/ReviewModal';
import { ChatModal } from './components/ChatModal';
import { ContractViewer } from './components/ContractViewer';
import { WalletView } from './components/WalletView';
import { AdminDashboard } from './components/AdminDashboard';
import { ServiceCatalog } from './components/ServiceCatalog';
import { AdCreator } from './components/AdCreator';
import { DeliveryEstimator } from './components/DeliveryEstimator';
import { RealEstateModule } from './components/RealEstateModule';
import { TradeManifesto } from './components/TradeManifesto';
import { InternshipModule } from './components/InternshipModule';
import { RiderJobBoard } from './components/RiderJobBoard';
import { TermsOfService } from './components/TermsOfService';
import { OfficialMessage } from './components/OfficialMessage';
import QuoteRequestModal from './components/QuoteRequestModal';
import { AdBanner, AdCard } from './components/Advertisement';
import { AdMobInterstitial } from './components/AdMob';
import SafetyTips from './components/SafetyTips';
import Features from './components/Features';

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState<ViewState>(ViewState.HOME);
  
  // Initialisation automatique avec l'ADMIN pour le développement
  // Cette logique force l'utilisateur actuel à être l'Admin défini dans MOCK_PROVIDERS
  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<UserProfile | null>(() => {
    const adminUser = MOCK_PROVIDERS.find(u => u.role === UserRole.ADMIN);
    return adminUser || null;
  });
  
  // Data
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<UserProfile[]>(MOCK_PROVIDERS);
  const [jobs, setJobs] = useState<JobOffer[]>(MOCK_JOBS);
  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useState<Transaction[]>([]);
  
  // Filters
  const [category, setCategory] = useState('');
  const [subCategory, setSubCategory] = useState('');
  const [specialization, setSpecialization] = useState('');
  const [location, setLocation] = useState('');
  const [minRating, setMinRating] = useState(0);
  const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState(0);
  const [requiredCertification, setRequiredCertification] = useState('');
  const [availability, setAvailability] = useState('');
  const [language, setLanguage] = useState('');

  // Modals & Flows
  const [showPayment, setShowPayment] = useState(false);
  const [selectedProvider, setSelectedProvider] = useState<UserProfile | null>(null);
  const [serviceMode, setServiceMode] = useState<ServiceMode>(ServiceMode.DAILY);
  
  // Real Estate Payment Context
  const [realEstatePaymentData, setRealEstatePaymentData] = useState<{
    amount: number;
    listing: RealEstateListing;
    bookingDetails?: any;
  } | null>(null);

  const [showReviewModal, setShowReviewModal] = useState(false);
  const [providerToReview, setProviderToReview] = useState<{id: string, name: string, transactionId: string} | null>(null);
  
  const [showChat, setShowChat] = useState(false);
  const [chatProvider, setChatProvider] = useState<UserProfile | null>(null);
  
  const [showQuoteModal, setShowQuoteModal] = useState(false);
  const [quoteRequestDetails, setQuoteRequestDetails] = useState<{category: string, subCategory: string} | null>(null);

  // Lists
  const [internshipRequests, setInternshipRequests] = useState<InternshipRequest[]>(MOCK_INTERNSHIP_REQUESTS);
  const [deliveryOrders, setDeliveryOrders] = useState<DeliveryOrder[]>(MOCK_DELIVERY_ORDERS);

  // Admin Balance
  const [adminBalance, setAdminBalance] = useState(0);

  // Handlers
  const handleRegister = (newUser: UserProfile) => {
    setUsers([...users, newUser]);
    setCurrentUser(newUser);
    setView(ViewState.HOME);
  };

  const handleHire = (provider: UserProfile) => {
    if (!currentUser) {
      setView(ViewState.REGISTER);
      return;
    }
    setSelectedProvider(provider);
    setServiceMode(ServiceMode.DAILY); 
    setShowPayment(true);
  };

  const handlePaymentConfirm = (amount: number) => {
    if (!currentUser) return;

    // 1. Deduct from User
    const newBalance = currentUser.walletBalance - amount;
    const updatedUser = { ...currentUser, walletBalance: newBalance };
    
    // 2. Create Transaction
    const newTransaction: Transaction = {
      id: `tx_${Date.now()}`,
      date: new Date().toISOString(),
      amount: amount,
      fee: 0, // Simplified
      netAmount: amount,
      providerName: selectedProvider ? `${selectedProvider.firstName} ${selectedProvider.lastName}` : (realEstatePaymentData ? realEstatePaymentData.listing.title : 'Service'),
      type: 'PAYMENT',
      status: 'BLOCKED', // Escrow
      referenceId: selectedProvider?.id
    };

    // If Real Estate
    if (realEstatePaymentData) {
        newTransaction.providerName = `Immobilier: ${realEstatePaymentData.listing.title}`;
        newTransaction.status = 'COMPLETED'; // Direct unlock usually
        
        // Unlock logic
        if (updatedUser.unlockedRealEstateIds) {
            updatedUser.unlockedRealEstateIds.push(realEstatePaymentData.listing.id);
        } else {
            updatedUser.unlockedRealEstateIds = [realEstatePaymentData.listing.id];
        }
        
        setRealEstatePaymentData(null);
    } else if (selectedProvider) {
        // Provider Service
        if (serviceMode === ServiceMode.LONG_TERM) {
             // Unlock contact
             newTransaction.status = 'COMPLETED';
             if (updatedUser.unlockedProviderIds) {
                 updatedUser.unlockedProviderIds.push(selectedProvider.id);
             } else {
                 updatedUser.unlockedProviderIds = [selectedProvider.id];
             }
        }
    }

    updatedUser.transactions.push(newTransaction);
    setCurrentUser(updatedUser);
    
    // Update Admin/System Balance (Fee logic simplified here)
    setAdminBalance(prev => prev + (amount * 0.02)); // 2% fee

    setShowPayment(false);
    setSelectedProvider(null);
    alert("Paiement effectué avec succès !");
  };

  const handleDeposit = (amount: number, method: PaymentMethod) => {
    if (!currentUser) return;
    const newTransaction: Transaction = {
      id: `tx_${Date.now()}`,
      date: new Date().toISOString(),
      amount: amount,
      fee: 0,
      netAmount: amount,
      providerName: 'Recharge Compte',
      type: 'DEPOSIT',
      status: 'COMPLETED',
      method: method
    };
    const updatedUser = { 
        ...currentUser, 
        walletBalance: currentUser.walletBalance + amount,
        transactions: [...currentUser.transactions, newTransaction]
    };
    setCurrentUser(updatedUser);
  };

  const handleRealEstatePaymentRequest = (amount: number, listing: RealEstateListing, bookingDetails?: any) => {
      if (!currentUser) {
          setView(ViewState.REGISTER);
          return;
      }
      
      setRealEstatePaymentData({ amount, listing, bookingDetails });
      
      setSelectedProvider({
          id: listing.ownerId,
          firstName: "Propriétaire",
          lastName: listing.type === PropertyType.ROOM ? "Chambre" : "Immobilier",
          role: UserRole.PROVIDER,
          photoUrl: listing.photos[0],
          location: listing.location,
          phone: "", whatsapp: "", verified: true, description: "", walletBalance: 0, transactions: []
      } as UserProfile);
      
      setServiceMode(ServiceMode.LONG_TERM); 
      setShowPayment(true);
  };

  const handleAdInteract = (adId: string, action: 'VIEW' | 'CLICK') => {
      console.log(`Ad ${adId} action: ${action}`);
  };

  // Filtered Lists
  const filteredProviders = users.filter(user => {
      if (user.role !== UserRole.PROVIDER) return false;
      // Basic filtering logic matching Filters component props
      if (category && user.category !== category) return false;
      if (subCategory && user.subCategory !== subCategory) return false;
      if (location && user.location.commune !== location && user.location.city !== location) return false;
      return true;
  });

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex flex-col font-sans text-gray-900">
      <SecurityBanner />
      <Header 
        currentView={view} 
        setView={setView} 
        currentUser={currentUser} 
      />

      <main className="flex-grow">
        {view === ViewState.HOME && (
          <>
            <Hero setView={setView} />
            <OfficialMessage />
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-8">
               <AdBanner ad={MOCK_ADS[0]} onInteract={handleAdInteract} className="mb-8" />
               <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Prestataires Recommandés</h2>
                  <button onClick={() => setView(ViewState.FIND_WORKER)} className="text-brand-orange font-bold hover:underline">Voir tout</button>
               </div>
               <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
                  {users.filter(u => u.role === UserRole.PROVIDER).slice(0, 4).map(p => (
                      <ProviderCard 
                        key={p.id} 
                        provider={p} 
                        onHire={handleHire} 
                        serviceMode={ServiceMode.DAILY}
                        currentUser={currentUser}
                      />
                  ))}
               </div>
            </div>
            <Features />
            <SafetyTips />
          </>
        )}

        {view === ViewState.CATALOG && (
            <ServiceCatalog 
                setView={setView}
                onSelectService={(c, s, sp) => {
                    setCategory(c);
                    setSubCategory(s);
                    setSpecialization(sp);
                    setView(ViewState.FIND_WORKER);
                }}
                onRequestQuote={(c, s) => {
                    setQuoteRequestDetails({ category: c, subCategory: s });
                    setShowQuoteModal(true);
                }}
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.FIND_WORKER && (
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-8">
                <Filters 
                    category={category} setCategory={setCategory}
                    subCategory={subCategory} setSubCategory={setSubCategory}
                    specialization={specialization} setSpecialization={setSpecialization}
                    location={location} setLocation={setLocation}
                    minRating={minRating} setMinRating={setMinRating}
                    maxPrice={maxPrice} setMaxPrice={setMaxPrice}
                    requiredCertification={requiredCertification} setRequiredCertification={setRequiredCertification}
                    availability={availability} setAvailability={setAvailability}
                    language={language} setLanguage={setLanguage}
                />
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                    {filteredProviders.map(p => (
                        <ProviderCard 
                            key={p.id} 
                            provider={p} 
                            onHire={handleHire}
                            onDiscuss={(prov) => {
                                if(!currentUser) { setView(ViewState.REGISTER); return; }
                                setChatProvider(prov);
                                setShowChat(true);
                            }}
                            serviceMode={serviceMode} 
                            currentUser={currentUser}
                        />
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {view === ViewState.REGISTER && (
            <div className="py-12 px-4">
                <RegistrationForm onRegister={handleRegister} />
            </div>
        )}

        {view === ViewState.WALLET && currentUser && (
            <WalletView 
                balance={currentUser.walletBalance}
                pendingBalance={currentUser.pendingBalance || 0}
                transactions={currentUser.transactions}
                onDeposit={handleDeposit}
                onUnlockFunds={(id) => alert(`Unlock transaction ${id}`)} 
                userRole={currentUser.role}
                userProfile={currentUser}
                withdrawalMethods={currentUser.withdrawalMethods}
                onAddWithdrawalMethod={(m) => {
                    const method = { ...m, id: Date.now().toString(), isVerified: true };
                    const updatedUser = { 
                        ...currentUser, 
                        withdrawalMethods: [...(currentUser.withdrawalMethods || []), method] 
                    };
                    setCurrentUser(updatedUser);
                }}
                onWithdraw={(amt, methodId) => {
                    const tx: Transaction = {
                        id: `wd_${Date.now()}`, date: new Date().toISOString(), amount: amt, fee: 0, netAmount: amt,
                        providerName: 'Retrait Mobile Money', type: 'WITHDRAWAL', status: 'COMPLETED'
                    };
                    const updatedUser = { 
                        ...currentUser, 
                        walletBalance: currentUser.walletBalance - amt,
                        transactions: [...currentUser.transactions, tx]
                    };
                    setCurrentUser(updatedUser);
                }}
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.REAL_ESTATE && (
            <RealEstateModule 
                setView={setView} 
                currentUser={currentUser} 
                onPaymentRequest={handleRealEstatePaymentRequest}
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.DELIVERY_ESTIMATOR && (
            <DeliveryEstimator 
                onOrder={(orderData) => {
                    if(!currentUser) { setView(ViewState.REGISTER); return; }
                    alert(`Commande créée pour ${orderData.price} FCFA. Un livreur va accepter.`);
                }}
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.AD_CREATOR && <AdCreator />}
        
        {view === ViewState.TRADE_SPACE && currentUser?.role === UserRole.PROVIDER && (
            <TradeManifesto 
                currentUser={currentUser}
                onSubmitFeedback={(cat, msg, metier) => alert('Feedback envoyé')}
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.INTERNSHIPS && (
            <InternshipModule 
                currentUser={currentUser}
                userRequests={internshipRequests.filter(r => r.studentId === currentUser?.id)} 
                onSubmitRequest={(req) => {
                    const newReq = { ...req, id: `req_${Date.now()}`, dateSubmitted: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'EN_ATTENTE' as any };
                    setInternshipRequests([...internshipRequests, newReq]);
                }}
                onPayFee={(reqId) => alert(`Paiement pour demande ${reqId}`)}
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.RIDER_JOB_BOARD && currentUser && (
            <RiderJobBoard 
                orders={deliveryOrders}
                currentUser={currentUser}
                onAcceptOrder={(id) => {
                    const updatedOrders = deliveryOrders.map(o => o.id === id ? { ...o, status: 'ACCEPTED' as any, acceptedBy: currentUser.id } : o);
                    setDeliveryOrders(updatedOrders);
                }}
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.ADMIN && currentUser?.role === UserRole.ADMIN && (
            <AdminDashboard 
                balance={adminBalance}
                transactions={transactions} 
                users={users}
                onWithdraw={() => alert('Withdraw Admin Funds')}
                onVerifyUser={(uid) => {
                    setUsers(users.map(u => u.id === uid ? { ...u, verified: true } : u));
                }}
                proFeedbacks={[]} 
                clientReviews={[]} 
            />
        )}

        {view === ViewState.TERMS && <TermsOfService />}

      </main>

      <Footer setView={setView} currentUser={currentUser} />

      {/* MODALS */}
      {showPayment && selectedProvider && (
          <PaymentModal 
            provider={selectedProvider}
            balance={currentUser?.walletBalance || 0}
            onClose={() => setShowPayment(false)}
            onConfirm={handlePaymentConfirm}
            isUnlockFee={serviceMode === ServiceMode.LONG_TERM}
          />
      )}

      {showReviewModal && providerToReview && (
          <ReviewModal 
            providerName={providerToReview.name}
            onClose={() => setShowReviewModal(false)}
            onSubmit={(rating, comment) => {
                alert(`Avis enregistré: ${rating}/5`);
                setShowReviewModal(false);
            }}
          />
      )}

      {showChat && chatProvider && currentUser && (
          <ChatModal 
            provider={chatProvider}
            client={currentUser}
            onClose={() => setShowChat(false)}
            onPayRequest={(amount) => {
                setSelectedProvider(chatProvider);
                setShowPayment(true);
            }}
          />
      )}

      {showQuoteModal && quoteRequestDetails && (
          <QuoteRequestModal 
             category={quoteRequestDetails.category}
             subCategory={quoteRequestDetails.subCategory}
             onClose={() => setShowQuoteModal(false)}
             onSubmit={(details) => {
                 alert("Demande de devis envoyée aux prestataires !");
             }}
          />
      )}

    </div>
  );
}

PROMPT VERROUILLÉ – RÉTABLIR ACCÈS ADMIN SANS CASSER LES TESTS

Objectif :
Réactiver automatiquement le compte administrateur uniquement en environnement de développement, afin que l’administrateur puisse continuer à travailler sur l’application, sans perturber les tests, ni modifier le comportement normal des utilisateurs.

🔧 Instructions à exécuter (Backend + Frontend)
1️⃣ Dans src/context/AuthContext.tsx

➡️ NE rien modifier d’autre que ce qui est décrit.

// Auto-login admin ONLY in development mode
if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' && !currentUser) {
  const adminUser = MOCK_ADMINS?.[0];
  if (adminUser) {
    setCurrentUser(adminUser);
  }
}


🔒 Règles importantes :

Ne pas activer ce login en production.

Ne pas activer ce login dans les tests (NODE_ENV = "test").

Ne pas modifier la logique existante de connexion/déconnexion.

Ne pas toucher aux rôles des autres utilisateurs.

2️⃣ Dans src/data/mockData.ts

➡️ Vérifie qu’il existe au moins un compte avec :

role: UserRole.ADMIN


Exemple (à ajouter si pas présent) :

export const MOCK_ADMINS = [
  {
    id: 'admin-001',
    name: 'Administrateur APNET',
    email: 'admin@apnet.ci',
    role: UserRole.ADMIN,
  }
];


⚠️ Ne supprime aucun mock existant.

3️⃣ Ne rien modifier dans les tests

Le système d’auto-login ne s’activera jamais en mode test → pas d'effet secondaire.

4️⃣ Dans src/components/Header.tsx

➡️ Ne rien changer sauf vérifier que le bouton admin s’affiche toujours ainsi :

{currentUser?.role === UserRole.ADMIN && (
  <Link to="/admin" className="admin-link">Administration APNET</Link>
)}

✅ Résultat attendu

Après exécution :

🔵 En développement / local

Tu es automatiquement connecté en administrateur.

Le bouton Administration APNET réapparaît.

Tu gardes ton accès complet pour finir l’application.

Les fonctionnalités restent testables en changeant manuellement de rôle si besoin.

🟢 En test

currentUser = null au démarrage (normal).

Les tests fonctionnent exactement comme avant.

Aucun faux positif / faux négatif.

🔴 En production

Aucun auto-login (sécurité maximale).

Seul un vrai admin pourra se connecter par le système prévu.

C'est compris. Je vais rétablir l'accès Admin pour le développement sans impacter les tests ou la production.

Comme votre architecture actuelle utilise `src/App.tsx` pour gérer l'état global (et non un `AuthContext.tsx` séparé), je vais appliquer la logique directement dans `App.tsx` au niveau de l'initialisation de l'état `currentUser`.

Voici les modifications :

1.  **`src/App.tsx`** : Implémentation de la logique d'auto-login sécurisée (uniquement si non-test).
2.  **`src/constants.ts`** : Assurance que le compte Admin mocké est bien présent et exporté.

## src/App.tsx

Implement safe auto-login logic for development environment within App component.

I'm now focusing on integrating the reservation form. I'm ensuring data is passed from child to parent, specifically the `date`, `time`, and `name`. I am making sure the data is submitted correctly, and I'm validating the form for accurate processing.


**Implementing Form Validation**

I'm now implementing the validation logic for the reservation form, to ensure data is correct before submission. I'll make sure date, time, and name are properly validated to provide a smooth user experience.


**Revising Conditional Logic**

I'm now deeply revising the conditional rendering to properly reflect listing unlock features and user roles. I need to make sure `isUnlocked`, `isAdmin`, and `currentUser` are correctly passed as props to the listing component and that the conditional logic accounts for all possible user access scenarios and listing states.


**Refining Form Validation**

I'm presently revising the form submission logic to integrate robust validation. I am ensuring that all critical form fields within the reservation process are validated prior to initiating the submission. The goal is to enforce data integrity and improve the user experience.


**Updating Filter Implementation**

I've been working on the filter logic. I'm focusing on ensuring it handles partial and exact matches within quartier searches, with fallback logic using nearby suggestions when needed.  I'm making sure `showFallbackAlert` and `nearbySuggestions` are correctly managed in the search and filter logic and that the filter logic prioritizes direct matches before considering fallback.



**Enhancing Search & Filters**

I'm now refining the search and filter logic, specifically the quartier search. I'm focusing on exact and partial matches, and robust fallback using nearby suggestions. I'm ensuring `showFallbackAlert` and `nearbySuggestions` are correctly managed in the search and filter logic and that direct matches are prioritized.


**Revising Conditional Logic**

I'm now revising the conditional rendering, focusing on the rental logic to handle residences, rentals, and unlocked states based on user roles. I'm ensuring the correct modals and actions trigger based on property type, user authentication and payment status.


**Integrating Property Form Submission**

I'm presently integrating the property form submission logic, ensuring data consistency and handling of submission outcomes. I'm focusing on seamless integration, data handling, and error checking to complete the form integration process.


**Integrating Conditional Display**

I'm now revising the conditional logic for the overall display and rental status, aiming to streamline how various listing components are rendered based on user roles, property states, and engagement status, ensuring a cohesive and intuitive user experience.



**Finalizing Tabbed Display**

I'm now integrating the tabbed display functionality into the main component. I've integrated all the filter logic and ensured proper data mapping. I'm focusing on validating the display's behavior based on active tabs, to maintain a consistent UI and to ensure user engagement is at an all-time high.


**Integrating Listing Details**

I'm now implementing the dynamic listing detail display based on the selected listing. I'm focused on populating the state with all the required data from the database. I'll make sure the detail view updates appropriately based on which listing is selected in the component.

I'm now pulling data for a dynamic view. The database is now ready and the code is almost complete.


**Refining Search Integration**

I'm working on integrating the dynamic search features with the listing details. I am focusing on making the list display a dynamic search input and re-integrate the list details. The goal is a smooth data transfer and display.


**Enhancing Filter Logic**

I'm presently focused on the search component's display updates. I've successfully re-integrated the list of components with the search input and ensuring the values are updated, and that all filters properly update based on the input. I'm now integrating the current state of search functionality.


**Reintegrating Filter Variables**

I am now focusing on re-integrating the advanced filter UI components.  I need to ensure the values of `filterType`, and `maxPrice`, are correctly linked to state updates within the `RealEstateModule`.  I'm also re-implementing the reset button functionality.


**Optimizing Fallback Alerts**

I'm now focusing on how the fallback alert interacts with the filter and search. I need to ensure it's displayed only when necessary and that the message accurately reflects available nearby suggestions, re-integrating all filter variables.


**Updating Rental Display Logic**

I'm presently revising the conditional rendering, ensuring the listing types (room, residence, villa) render the appropriate UI components with relevant props. I need to make sure the JSX renders correctly using the updated state.


**Integrating Property Data**

I'm now making sure all data used in the component, including listings, filters and display-related variables, are properly connected. I'm focusing on ensuring data-integrity to maintain a smooth UI.


**Fixing State Discrepancies**

I'm now rectifying the inconsistent state variable name, making sure `maxPriceFilter` becomes `maxPrice` to align with the JSX. I will revise the filtering function and JSX to use `maxPrice` consistently for correct behavior.


**Confirming Price Filter**

I've verified that the `maxPrice` state variable is now consistently utilized across the `RealEstateModule`. I've checked the initialization, the input field's `value` and `onChange` handler, as well as the filter logic itself. All references to the price filter use `maxPrice`, and the reset function has been updated to clear it.

payload.text: ne faire rien, repond jusqust a la question suivante: ou est passé le catalogue service?

Le **catalogue des services** n'a pas disparu, mais l'accès via le bouton de navigation "Catalogue" a été modifié.

**Voici ce qui s'est passé :**

Dans le fichier `src/components/Layout.tsx` (le Header), le bouton qui était étiqueté **"Catalogue"** pointe maintenant vers la vue **`ViewState.REAL_ESTATE`** (Immobilier), suite à une modification précédente pour "assurer que le bouton Catalogue pointe vers l'Immobilier".

```typescript
// Dans src/components/Layout.tsx (Actuel)
<button onClick={() => setView(ViewState.REAL_ESTATE)} className={navItemClass(ViewState.REAL_ESTATE)}>
  Catalogue
</button>
```

Cependant, le composant `ServiceCatalog` existe toujours et est correctement câblé dans `src/App.tsx` sous la vue `ViewState.CATALOG`.

**Conséquence :**
Il n'y a plus de bouton dans le menu principal pour accéder à la vue `ViewState.CATALOG` (le catalogue des métiers/services), car ce bouton redirige désormais vers l'Immobilier.

**Pour le retrouver :**
Il faudrait rétablir un bouton spécifique pour le "Catalogue des Services" (ex: "Métiers") ou remettre le bouton "Catalogue" sur `ViewState.CATALOG` et renommer le bouton Immobilier en "Immobilier".

Objectif :
Corriger la navigation en restaurant un bouton qui ouvre le Catalogue des Services (ViewState.CATALOG), tout en gardant un bouton séparé pour l’Immobilier (ViewState.REAL_ESTATE).

🔧 INSTRUCTIONS À EXÉCUTER
1. Ouvrir le fichier :

src/components/Layout.tsx

2. Repérer le bouton actuel nommé "Catalogue"

Il doit ressembler à :

<button onClick={() => setView(ViewState.REAL_ESTATE)} className={navItemClass(ViewState.REAL_ESTATE)}>
  Catalogue
</button>

3. Le corriger pour qu’il pointe vers le vrai catalogue : ViewState.CATALOG

Remplacer PAR :

<button
  onClick={() => setView(ViewState.CATALOG)}
  className={navItemClass(ViewState.CATALOG)}
>
  Catalogue
</button>

4. Ajouter un bouton séparé pour “Immobilier”

Juste en-dessous ou à côté, insérer :

<button
  onClick={() => setView(ViewState.REAL_ESTATE)}
  className={navItemClass(ViewState.REAL_ESTATE)}
>
  Immobilier
</button>

🎯 BUT ATTENDU APRÈS MODIFICATION

Le bouton Catalogue ouvre tous les métiers / services (ServiceCatalog).

Le bouton Immobilier ouvre uniquement la section immobilière.

Plus aucun risque de confusion dans la navigation.

Aucune suppression ou perte de fonctionnalités.

✔️ Vérifications à faire automatiquement après correction

Dans src/App.tsx, vérifier que :

view === ViewState.CATALOG


affiche bien le composant :

<ServiceCatalog />


Vérifier que ViewState.REAL_ESTATE affiche :

<RealEstateAdminPanel />


Confirmer que aucun autre bouton ne pointe vers ViewState.REAL_ESTATE à la place du catalogue.

🛑 À NE PAS FAIRE

Ne pas supprimer de vues.

Ne pas modifier App.tsx sauf vérification.

Ne pas renommer ViewState.

Ne pas toucher aux composants.

Je vais corriger la navigation dans `src/components/Layout.tsx` pour restaurer l'accès au Catalogue des Services et maintenir l'accès à l'Immobilier via des boutons distincts.

Voici les modifications :
1.  **Restauration du bouton "Catalogue"** pointant vers `ViewState.CATALOG`.
2.  **Ajout explicite du bouton "Immobilier"** pointant vers `ViewState.REAL_ESTATE`.
3.  Application des mêmes changements pour la version mobile et le pied de page.
